---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Research-adjacent notes on embodied AI, vision-language-action models, and ML data engineering. For more casual Korean-language posts, see [milkclouds.work](https://milkclouds.work)."
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
